container_gap: v1 describes tensors, not side information shared across them, so a shared basis, a runtime table or a serialized Doctor state has no home. Section 5.2 requires both to be billed, so the next parent needs this before either can ship.

independently_reproduced_on_a_new_parent: low-rank codec (Type-1, 2026-05-30): rank 71 mean weight error 0.9497

glm52.functional.block.v1.finding: 256 experts do not share a subspace

law.statement: GLM-5.2's routed-expert path needs about 1.5 bits per weight under closed-form weight-space compression to retain half the teacher's block direction; the one-bit law allows 1.0, where the measured curve sits near 0.30

asymmetric_bit_allocation.why: routed experts are 97.492 percent of the weight; nothing can donate

open_directions: a student fitted against block output rather than weights (section 6.1)
IndexShare selection itself, untested at 256 positions against index_topk 2048
recommendation_for_next_parent: run the above-ceiling oracle on one window before building any rate ladder. One rung at twice the target rate separates rate-bound from family-bound for the cost of a single window, and it would have saved most of this run's compute.

rung.outcome_detail: complete research artifacts exist and verify at four exact rates with complete tensor coverage, and the tested sub-0.75 region closes negatively on the routed-expert path across four representation families

throughput.corrects_prior_note: parallelism does raise this link, by 17.8 percent, then saturates

transfers_unchanged: complete-BPW accounting reconciled against physical bytes
protected organs carried natively and billed from stored bytes
trajectory measurement against a sealed capsule
